sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10037" key="a)nti/koilon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίκοιλον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n10037.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hollow of the instep,</tr_> dub. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">85</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
